summary: KOLO CRM Authentication Testing Complete - All features verified working. Fixed a critical bug where logout wasn't invalidating Bearer token sessions. All 16 backend tests pass, all UI flows work correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Logout endpoint didn't invalidate Bearer token sessions
bugs_fixed.root_cause: The logout function only checked for session token in cookies (request.cookies.get('session_token')), but the frontend sends the token via Authorization: Bearer header
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check for Authorization header in logout endpoint, same as get_user_from_session function

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with trialing status and 7-day trial
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - rejects duplicate email with error message
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - rejects password < 6 chars
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - rejects invalid email format
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns token for valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects wrong password
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects non-existent user
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns user data with valid Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 without token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 with invalid token
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - now correctly invalidates Bearer token sessions
Backend: Token persists across multiple requests
Backend: /api/tasks requires authentication
Backend: /api/prospects requires authentication
Frontend: Home page loads correctly with Try for free button
Frontend: Register page shows 7 days free badge
Frontend: Registration creates account and redirects to /app
Frontend: Login with existing user credentials works
Frontend: Token stored in localStorage as kolo_token
Frontend: Session persists after page refresh
Frontend: Today tab displays correctly
Frontend: Prospects tab accessible via nav-prospects
Frontend: Tasks tab accessible via nav-tasks
Frontend: Settings page accessible via My Profile button
Frontend: Logout redirects to /login
critical_code_review_comments: Logout bug was caused by inconsistent session token retrieval - get_user_from_session checks both cookies and Bearer header, but logout only checked cookies. Now fixed.

test_credentials.created_during_tests: Multiple users created with emails like ui_test_*@example.com, persist_test_*@example.com
test_credentials.note: Each test creates unique users to avoid conflicts

seed_data_creation: No manual seed data needed - tests create their own users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All authentication flows verified working: register, login, auth/me, logout, session persistence. The logout bug has been fixed - it now correctly invalidates both cookie-based and Bearer token sessions. Navigation tabs (Today, Prospects, Tasks) and Settings page all accessible.

verified_features.register: POST /api/auth/register - creates user with trialing status, 7-day trial
verified_features.login: POST /api/auth/login - returns token in response body
verified_features.session_persistence: Token stored in localStorage, survives page refresh
verified_features.navigation: Today/Prospects/Tasks tabs work via data-testid nav elements
verified_features.settings: My Profile button opens Settings page with logout option

rca_of_issue.issue: Logout wasn't invalidating Bearer token sessions
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The logout endpoint (server.py line 535) only checked for session_token in cookies via request.cookies.get('session_token'). However, the frontend sends the token via Authorization: Bearer header. The get_user_from_session function correctly checks both sources, but logout didn't.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Register/login to get a token, 2. Call POST /api/auth/logout with Bearer token, 3. Call GET /api/auth/me with same token - it still works (should return 401)
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Added same header check logic to logout function - now checks cookies first, then Authorization header
